howItWorks.title: How iWillTravel Works
howItWorks.description: Three simple steps to your next adventure.

step1.title: Select Destination
step1.description: Choose your dream location or let AI suggest a spot based on your vibe.

step2.title: Customize Preferences
step2.description: Set your budget, interests, and dietary restrictions for the perfect plan.

step3.title: Generate Itinerary
step3.description: Get a comprehensive, day-by-day schedule with estimated costs and tips.
